headline: How The Dollar Tree (DLTR) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Split On Traffic And Valuation
summary: Dollar Tree’s fair value estimate has been adjusted to $124.91 from $125.26, a small reset that still reflects detailed work inside analysts’ models. This fine tuning mirrors the split on Wall Street, where bullish voices highlight execution progress and earnings potential, while more cautious views point to traffic pressure, comp durability and how the stock trades against those risks. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting calls and track the evolving narrative around...
